title: CodeCartographySection
description: Code cartography output section of the memory_cartographer envelope. Contains the results of a code scan: file inventory, extracted symbols, cross-file references, module graph, architecture edges, and dependency flow. See docs/contracts/memory-cartographer-contract.md and normalization-rules.md for ordering and stability guarantees.

partial.description: true if this section represents incomplete results (e.g., due to timeout, file-count cap, or depth cap). When true, the top-level generation_metadata.partial is also true.

files.description: Inventory of source files within scope. Ordered by workspace-relative path ascending (lexicographic, case-sensitive on case-preserving filesystems). The ordering guarantee is stable across runs on the same file tree.

symbols.description: Extracted symbol definitions across all scanned files. Ordered by: (1) file path ascending, then (2) start line ascending, then (3) symbol name ascending. Ordering is deterministic for a given file tree.

references.description: Cross-file symbol references (call sites, imports, usages). Ordered by: (1) from_file ascending, then (2) from_line ascending, then (3) to_file ascending. Ordering is deterministic.

module_graph.description: Adjacency representation of the module dependency graph. Nodes are workspace-relative module identifiers; edges are import/require relationships.

architecture_edges.description: Higher-level architectural dependency edges (e.g., layer violations, cross-boundary calls). Ordered by (from_module, to_module) pair ascending.

dependency_flow.description: Topologically sorted dependency tiers and detected entry points for the module graph.

FileEntry.title: FileEntry
FileEntry.description: A single source file within the scan scope.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the file (forward-slash separator, no leading slash). Primary sort key for the files array.

language.description: Detected language identifier (e.g., 'python', 'typescript', 'rust', 'javascript'). 'unknown' when detection fails.

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes at scan time.

mtime_unix_ns.description: Last-modification time as Unix nanoseconds. Used in fingerprint computation.

symbol_count.description: Number of symbols extracted from this file. 0 if no symbols were extracted (e.g., parse error or no recognizable declarations).

parse_error.description: true if the file could not be fully parsed; the file is still included in the inventory but symbol extraction may be incomplete.

id.description: Stable identity key for this symbol. Format: '{workspace_relative_file_path}::{symbol_name}'. See normalization-rules.md for full identity key rules.

file.description: Workspace-relative path to the file containing this symbol definition.

name.description: Symbol name as it appears in the source code.

qualified_name.description: Fully qualified name including namespace/module prefix, when determinable. Absent when qualification cannot be resolved.

start_line.description: 1-based line number where the symbol definition starts.

end_line.description: 1-based line number where the symbol definition ends. Absent when not determinable.

exported.description: true if the symbol is exported/public from its module.

ReferenceEntry.title: ReferenceEntry
ReferenceEntry.description: A cross-file reference from one location to a symbol defined in another file.

from_file.description: Workspace-relative path of the file containing the reference site. Primary sort key.

from_line.description: 1-based line number of the reference site in the source file. Secondary sort key.

to_symbol_id.description: Stable identity key of the referenced symbol (matches SymbolEntry.id).

to_file.description: Workspace-relative path of the file where the referenced symbol is defined. Tertiary sort key.

ModuleGraph.title: ModuleGraph
ModuleGraph.description: Adjacency representation of the inter-module dependency graph.

nodes.description: All module identifiers in the graph (workspace-relative paths, sorted ascending).

edges.description: Import/require edges between modules. Ordered by (from, to) pair ascending.

from.description: Workspace-relative module path of the importing module.

to.description: Workspace-relative module path of the imported module.

ArchitectureEdge.title: ArchitectureEdge
ArchitectureEdge.description: A higher-level architectural dependency edge (layer boundary, cross-concern dependency).

from_module.description: Workspace-relative path of the source module. Primary sort key.

to_module.description: Workspace-relative path of the target module. Secondary sort key.

annotation.description: Optional human-readable annotation explaining the edge (e.g., which architectural rule was matched).

DependencyFlow.title: DependencyFlow
DependencyFlow.description: Topologically sorted dependency tiers and entry points derived from the module graph.

tiers.description: Topological tiers of the module graph. Tier 0 contains modules with no dependencies; each subsequent tier depends only on earlier tiers. Within each tier, modules are sorted ascending.

items.description: Sorted list of workspace-relative module paths in this tier.

entry_points.description: Detected entry-point modules (not imported by any other module in scope). Sorted ascending.

cycles.description: Detected circular dependency cycles. Each cycle is the sorted list of module paths forming the cycle.
